audit_items.proof_trace: Both return paths normalize to 18 decimals: the Data Streams path stores prices pre-normalized in transmit() (lines 166-172), and the Data Feed fallback path normalizes via usdDataFeed.decimals() inline (lines 394-400). dataStreamsFeedDecimals==0 is rejected at config time (line 253-255), and feed rotation deletes the stale price and updates the feed-ID mapping so no 0-decimal price can be transmitted.
